impact: This advances the PP&D plan by checking that committed public crawl planning, source indexing, normalized extraction, and requirement fixtures retain at least one shared provenance thread by canonical URL or source evidence ID without crawling or touching DevHub.
summary: Add a narrow fixture-only source provenance continuity test for PP&D public source layers.
target_task: Task checkbox-66: Task checkbox-61: Add a small PP&D source-provenance continuity test that links the public crawl dry-run plan, source index records, normalized document fixtures, and requirement fixtures by canonical URL or source evidence ID.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
